problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
